testcase.name: test_websocket_endpoint_configured

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 200 assert 200 in [400, 403, 426, 500] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_34_p1_p2_features.py:282: in test_websocket_endpoint_configured assert response.status_code in [400, 403, 426, 500], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 200 E assert 200 in [400, 403, 426, 500] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
